title: acacia senegal subsp. senegalensis
intro: Acacia senegal subsp. senegalensis, also known as Acacia senegal, is a deciduous tree that belongs to the Acacia genus, native to the Sahel region of Africa. This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high tannin content, which is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Acacia senegal include its ability to treat diarrhea, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an anti-inflammatory agent. Acacia senegal is prepared for herbal use by extracting its tannins through water or solvent extraction, and the resulting preparations are used in traditional medicine to promote health and well-being.
